name: Service DLL & Svchost Groups
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: All Windows services configuration and SvcHost process groupings.
forensic_value: Malicious services appear here. ServiceDll value shows actual DLL loaded — check for DLLs outside System32. Unknown SvcHost groups with unexpected DLLs are a rootkit indicator.
